title: Proclamation No. 1141, s. 1973
text:
MALACAÑANG RESIDENCE OF THE PRESIDENT OF THE PHILIPINES MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 1141

RESERVING FOR AGRICULTURAL SCHOOL SITE PURPOSES A CERTAIN PARCEL OF LAND OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN SITUATED IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ROSARIO, PROVINCE OF LA UNION, ISLAND OF LUZON

Upon recommendation of the Secretary of Agriculture and Natural Resources and pursuant to the powers vested upon me by law, I, FERDINAND E. MARCOS, President of the Philippines, do hereby withdraw from sale, settlement or disposition and reserve for agricultural school site purposes under the administration of the Director of Vocational Education, subject to private rights, if any there be, and to future survey, a certain parcel of land of the public domain containing an area of 149,9016 hectares situated in the municipality of Rosario, province of La Union, island of Luzon, which parcel is more particularly described and indicated in Bureau of Forestry Map Cr-105 as follows:

“Beginning at point 1 which is identical to Corner 58 CN. F. Parcel 1, Rosario, La Union, CN. F. 760 and.,

thence S. 47 deg. 50′ E., 404.18 m. to point 2; thence N. 54 deg. 29′ E., 108.52 m. to point 3; thence N. 29 deg. 09′ E., 125.03 m. to point 4; thence S. 69 deg. 11′ E., 133.19 m. to point 5; thence S. 23 deg. 30′ E., 271.31 m. to point 6; thence S. 36 deg. 46′ E., 160.79 m. to point 7; thence S. 36 deg. 00′ E., 240.54 m. to point 8; thence S. 63 deg. 07′ W., 18.42 m. to point 9; thence S. 78 deg. 10′ W., 86.42 m. to point 10; thence S. 66 deg. 05′ W., 157.48 m. to point 11; thence S. 61 deg. 15′ W., 18.84 m. to point 12; thence S. 64 deg. 54′ E., 30.91 m. to point 13; thence S. 57 deg. 43′ W., 47.15 m. to point 14; thence S. 24 deg. 54′ E., 503.41 m. to point 15; thence N. 87 deg. 08′ E., 172.85 m. to point 16; thence S. 63 deg. 05′ E., 41.19 m. to point 17; thence S. 12 deg. 33′ E., 182.59 m. to point 18; thence S. 38 deg. 07′ E., 397.34 m. to point 19; thence S. 2 deg. 09′ W., 252.00 m. to point 20; thence S. 47 deg. 11′ W., 93.62 m. to point 21; thence S. 10 deg. 38′ E., 270.30 m. to point 22; thence S. 32 deg. 56′ E., 115.06 m. to point 23; thence S. 16 deg. 31′ E., 16.07 m. to point 24; thence S. 72 deg. 53′ W., 36.00 m. to point 25; thence S. 15 deg. 12′ E., 90.58 m. to point 26; thence N. 75 deg. 40′ W., 163.24 m. to point 27; thence N. 11 deg. 55′ E., 62.25 m. to point 28; thence N. 42 deg. 28′ W., 19.39 m. to point 29; thence N. 78 deg. 50′ W., 9.75 m. to point 30; thence N. 32 deg. 23′ W., 37.05 m. to point 31; thence N. 32 deg. 49′ W., 219.74 m. to point 32; thence N. 53 deg. 44′ W., 409.50 m. to point 33; thence N. 24 deg. 42′ W., 131.81 m. to point 34; thence N. 74 deg. 49′ E., 170.95 m. to point 35; thence N. 23 deg. 16′ W.,  90.84 m. to point 36; thence N. 29 deg. 09′ W., 42.43 m. to point 37; thence N. 8 deg. 44′ W., 85.26 m. to point 38; thence S. 79 deg. 08′ W., 158.51 m. to point 39; thence N. 28 deg. 02′ W., 289.70 m. to point 40; thence N. 26 deg. 17′ W., 328.76 m. to point 41; thence N. 68 deg. 28′ W., 247.41 m. to point 42; thence N. 64 deg. 35′ W., 123.07 m. to point 43; thence N. 10 deg. 41′ E., 71.68 m. to point 44; thence N. 12 deg. 17′ W., 101.46 m. to point 45; thence N. 57 deg. 48′ W., 64.85 m. to point 46; thence N. 61 deg. 31′ W., 122.40 m. to point 47; thence N. 0 deg. 33′ W., 149.80 m. to point 48; thence N. 26 deg. 18′ W., 186.57 m. to point 49; thence N. 59 deg. 25′ E., 114.87 m. to point 50; thence N. 21 deg. 19′ W., 280.39 m. to point 51; thence N. 64 deg. 00′ E., 380.00 m. to point of beginning. IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 10th day of May, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and seventy-three.

(SGD.) FERDINAND E. MARCOS President of the Philippines

By the President:

(SGD.) ALEJANDRO MELCHOR Executive Secretary

Source: CDAsia
